title: JD Vance's 'Shadow Broker' Role: How Trump's Veep Delivered Iran Truce
summary_full: US Vice-President JD Vance, a sceptic of the war on Iran, helped broker a two-week ceasefire via backchannel talks with Tehran officials facilitated by Pakistan.
summary_public: US Vice-President JD Vance, a sceptic of the war on Iran, helped broker a two-week ceasefire via backchannel talks with Tehran officials facilitated by Pakistan.
